description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ROS 2 CI that runs on pull requests to the 'ros2' branch and any branch starting with 'ros2/'. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple ROS distributions (dashing, eloquent, foxy) on ubuntu-latest environments with corresponding Docker images. For each job, set up directories, check out the repository, set up the ROS environment, and build and test the rosbridge_suite package.
